description: Address critical security and correctness issues from code review: replace Function() eval in calculator tool, add auth to prekey endpoint, fix non-atomic counter increments, fix feed personalization, and replace PrismaClient = any with narrow interfaces.
steps: Replace Function() constructor in calculator tool with safe token-by-token math evaluator
Add auth check to GET /encryption/keys/:userId endpoint
Fix likePost, likePhoto, incrementView to use Prisma { increment: 1 } pattern
Fix getFeed to filter by followed users via userRelationship table
Replace PrismaClient = any in 5 apps with narrow interface types
acceptance_criteria: Calculator evaluates math without using Function() or eval
All counter increments use atomic Prisma increment pattern
getFeed queries userRelationship to filter posts by followed users
Each app types.ts defines narrow interfaces matching actual usage
All 547+ existing tests continue to pass
